op.text: Priya: Approximately two weeks before 2025-04-27, Priya asked Dana to borrow eight thousand dollars for a ceramics studio lease deposit and buildout; Dana said no immediately and 'badly,' citing not mixing money and friendship; Priya went 'very quiet and then very polite'; they have skipped pottery class twice since; Dana described the exchange as delivering 'ten years of friendship a verdict in four seconds' and recognizes the delivery hurt more than the answer itself

op.note: Pottery class with Priya has been skipped twice in the two weeks before 2025-04-27 due to conflict over loan request; Dana described the class as 'just sitting there on the calendar mocking me'

op.text: Needs to repair relationship with Priya after loan refusal conflict; wants to address how the answer was delivered without relitigating the loan decision itself; described situation as 'too raw' as of 2025-04-27

Sprained ankle badly on Saturday 2025-04-13 during mile nine of a trail run in Forest Park (wet root); diagnosed as bad grade-two sprain or worse; wore walking boot until late April 2025; boot scheduled to come off Thursday 2025-05-01; orthopedist confirmed ankle healing on schedule; physical therapy to start after boot removal

Recovering from ankle sprain; boot scheduled to come off Thursday 2025-05-01 with physical therapy to begin afterward; continuing Dorothy Jean restoration work on Sundays (can sand planks while sitting)
[as of 2025-04-27] Sam's decision on Austin job offer due in approximately one week (early May 2025); Dana described current moment as 'everything is happening at once'
